revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月廿三]][[zh:二月廿三]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 23|qq=February 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|qid=Q1194250|lt=Gangyō|1=Genryaku}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|884|en|884|qid=Q23895|lt=884|1=884}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – In an event, the Daijō-daijin and {{ill|Fujiwara no Mototsune|en|Fujiwara no Mototsune|qid=Q1397196|lt=Fujiwara Mototsune|1=Fujiwara no Mototsune}} supported the enthronement of {{ill|Emperor Kōkō|en|Emperor Kōkō|qid=Q440518|lt=Kōkō Tennō|1=Emperor Kōkō}}, who had been installed. * {{ill|Ten'yō|en|Ten'yō|qid=Q1194175|lt=Tenyō|1=Ten'yō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1144|en|1144|qid=Q19619|lt=1144|1=1144}} {{ill|March 28|en|March 28|qid=Q2458|lt=March 28|1=March 28}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōji (Heian period)|en|Kōji (Heian period)|qid=Q1194459|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Heian period)}} to {{ill|Ten'yō|en|Ten'yō|qid=Q1194175|lt=Tenyō|1=Ten'yō}}. * {{ill|Nin'an|ja|仁安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nin'an|1=Nin'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18925702}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1167|en|1167|qid=Q19678|lt=1167|1=1167}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|en|Taira no Kiyomori|qid=Q281833|lt=Taira no Kiyomori|1=Taira no Kiyomori}} visited {{ill|Itsukushima Shrine|en|Itsukushima Shrine|qid=Q191763|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|1=Itsukushima Shrine}} and dedicated his handwritten copy of the {{ill|Heart Sutra|en|Heart Sutra|qid=Q622868|lt=Heart Sutra|1=Heart Sutra (interlinear translation)}}. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|qid=Q509889|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1321|en|1321|qid=Q5769|lt=1321|1=1321}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – In celebration of the 【辛酉】 (Xinyou) Revolution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Gen'ō|en|Gen'ō|qid=Q1193925|lt=Gen'ō|1=Gen'ō}} to {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|qid=Q509889|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}}. * {{ill|Entoku|en|Entoku|qid=Q431465|lt=Entoku|1=Entoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1489|en|1489|qid=Q6665|lt=1489|1=1489}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – A ceremonial roof-raising (上棟式) was held at Ginkaku-ji (東山山荘・{{ill|Ginkaku-ji|en|Ginkaku-ji|qid=Q257473|lt=Jishō-ji|1=Ginkaku-ji}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|en|1576|qid=Q6700|lt=1576|1=1576}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} relocated from Gifu to Ōmi, establishing 【安土城】. * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1784|en|1784|qid=Q7752|lt=1784|1=1784}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|qid=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – In Chikushi Province, a peasant named Jinbei Shigehide discovered a gold seal proclaiming "King of Wa" ({{ill|Wano Kokuō In|ja|倭奴国王印|1=King of Na gold seal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wano Kokuō In|13=User:Immanuelle/King of Na gold seal|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 漢委奴国王印}}) in a rice paddy. * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|qid=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa|1=Kyōwa}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1802|en|1802|qid=Q6883|lt=1802|1=1802}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|qid=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – In response to Russia’s southward expansion, the Tokugawa shogunate established the Ezo Bugyō. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|March 21|en|March 21|qid=Q2433|lt=March 21|1=March 21}}) – In Yokohama, the first model steam locomotive in Japan was run at Perry’s reception area. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – The Meiji government launched the {{ill|Taisei-kan Nisshi|ja|太政官日誌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisei-kan Nisshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 官報|1=Kanpō (Japanese government gazette)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11452096}} (Great Council of State Journal). == Births == * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|qid=Q2502|lt=April 10|1=April 10}}) – {{ill|Yamagiwa Katsusaburō|en|Yamagiwa Katsusaburō|qid=Q6378193|lt=Yamagoku Katsuzaburō|1=Yamagiwa Katsusaburō}}, a pathologist who achieved the world’s first successful artificial carcinogenesis (died {{ill|1930|en|1930|qid=Q18787|lt=1930|1=1930}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – {{ill|Kotaro Honda|en|Kotaro Honda|qid=Q451062|lt=Honda Kōtarō|1=Kotaro Honda}}, a physicist and inventor of KS steel (died {{ill|1954|en|1954|qid=Q18581|lt=1954|1=1954}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|qid=Q6893|lt=1638|1=1638}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|qid=Q2505|lt=April 7|1=April 7}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Iehisa|en|Shimazu Iehisa|qid=Q1133219|lt=Shimazu Tadahisa|1=Shimazu Iehisa}}, head of the Satsuma Domain (born {{ill|1578|en|1578|qid=Q6707|lt=1578|1=1578}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – {{ill|Yamanami Keisuke|en|Yamanami Keisuke|qid=Q1361255|lt=Sannan Keisuke|1=Yamanami Keisuke}}, leader of the Shinsengumi (born {{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}}). == Commemorations == * [[Fujisan Kansha Kikan]] – The Mount Fuji Appreciation Period
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|22|2|24|1|23|3|2|0223|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|2月23日 (旧暦)|version=82281669|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:2 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:February 23 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 2월 23일]] [[ja:2月23日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月廿三]]
[[ar:February 23 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月廿三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月廿三]] {{wikidata link|Q839069}} [[Category:Days 23 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar February]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
